description: Visual Studio 2022 Community is open on the Start Window. Create a new Windows Forms App project named 'TemperatureConverter' at 'C:\Users\Docker\source\repos\'. The main form must be titled 'Temperature Converter' and contain labels for 'Celsius:' and 'Fahrenheit:', a 'txtCelsius' input TextBox, a read-only 'txtFahrenheit' output TextBox, and a 'btnConvert' button labeled 'Convert'. Implement logic to convert the numeric value from 'txtCelsius' to Fahrenheit using the formula (C * 9/5 + 32) upon clicking 'btnConvert', displaying the result in 'txtFahrenheit'. Build the solution successfully.
